case_title: COLOR SIENCE DIGITAL, INC. VS. V MAGAZINE, LLC

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY COLOR SIENCE DIGITAL, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COLOR SIENCE DIGITAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT V MAGAZINE, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $175 SERVED DEC-21-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT V MAGAZINE, LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF COLOR SIENCE DIGITAL, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID MAZIERC. DEFENDANT V. MAGAZINE, LLC. IS NOT PRESENT. SERVICE WAS NOT MADE WITHIN THE STATE AS REQUIRED BY CODE CIV. PROC., 116.340(E). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLOR SIENCE DIGITAL, INC.
